message:
refactor(net/unix): migrate Source trait to standard AsRawFd trait

Replace custom Source trait implementations with Rust's standard library
AsRawFd trait for unix listener and stream types. This aligns the codebase
with idiomatic Rust patterns and leverages the blanket impl for Source
that exists for any type implementing AsRawFd.

Key changes:
- UnixListenerSource: Implement AsRawFd instead of Source
- UnixStreamSource: Implement AsRawFd instead of Source
- Remove unused Source import from listener.rs and stream.rs
- Add from_parts constructor to UnixStream for reunite operation
- Fix reunite() to properly reconstruct UnixStream without registration

Also includes minor formatting fixes:
- Add newline at end of mpsc.rs
- Reorder imports alphabetically in worker.rs
- Adjust code formatting for register_io closures

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
